notes: Post-migration follow-up to .plans/active/signal-pool-yield-wiring; do not reopen that completed contracts lane.
status.json is authoritative; branch names are automation signals.
Target date is unset pending operator window. When chosen, update status.json.workflow.target_date and plan.todo.md together.
Do not broadcast transactions from this hub without fresh explicit operator approval.
Use package scripts only; do not add raw forge or ad hoc shell command chains.
Contracts lane cannot complete if enable-now stalls unless it records configure-now, operator-approved pause/disable, or an accepted-risk blocker.
Indexer verifier scope is narrowed in this hub to contracts currently defined/indexed by Envio; full expansion requires a named follow-up hub.
Record RED/GREEN proof with node scripts/harness/plan-hub.mjs record-tdd before marking behavior-changing lanes complete.

ui.handoff_note: Full admin marketplace UX pass: unavailable, needs-approval, ready, pending, success, and failure states. Use existing Admin* wrappers, localize en/es/pt strings, and record Storybook/browser evidence.

red.evidence: Failed before implementation: 2 of 8 tests failed. (1) state: unavailable > renders an unavailable alert and does NOT render children or approval CTA when readiness is unavailable — expected getMarketplaceReadiness to be called with 11155111, got zero calls. (2) state: unavailable > never calls useMarketplaceApprovals when readiness is unavailable (no unsafe approval reads) — expected zero calls, got one. The original gate did not consult readiness and unconditionally invoked the approvals hook even when the active chain's deployment artifact was missing required marketplace addresses.

green.command: cd packages/admin && bun run test src/__tests__/components/hypercerts/MarketplaceApprovalGate.test.tsx && bun run test src/__tests__/components/hypercerts/
green.evidence: Passed after implementation. MarketplaceApprovalGate.test.tsx: 8 of 8 tests pass; covers unavailable (alert + no approval reads), checking, needs-approval (with grantApprovals dispatch), ready, pending (disabled CTA), and failure (error inline, CTA retainable). Full hypercerts directory regression: 7 files, 153 tests passed. Locale coverage: 12 tests passed. Vocab lint: clean. Storybook check:stories: PASS. Admin build (VITE_CHAIN_ID=11155111): built in 2m 6s. Plan-hub validate: 20 feature hubs ok.

tdd.note: Admin marketplace UX state matrix now backed by shared getMarketplaceReadiness + useMarketplaceApprovals; no duplicated readiness logic in admin or client.

state_api.handoff_note: Shared marketplace readiness helpers, deployment-artifact contract mapping, approval/listing guards, and query invalidation. Hooks stay in shared and fail closed when config is incomplete.

red.command: cd packages/shared && bun run test -- src/__tests__/utils/marketplace-readiness.test.ts src/__tests__/modules/marketplace/approvals.test.ts src/__tests__/modules/marketplace/signing.test.ts src/__tests__/hooks/hypercerts/useCreateListing.test.ts src/__tests__/hooks/hypercerts/useBatchListForYield.test.ts src/__tests__/hooks/query-keys.test.ts; follow-up red: cd packages/shared && bun run test -- src/__tests__/hooks/hypercerts/useCancelListing.test.ts
red.evidence: Initial RED failed before implementation: readiness exports were missing; approvals read/built zero-address calls; signing used SDK addresses; create/batch listing hooks did not gate before signing/writing. Follow-up RED failed before the cancel-listing fix because useCancelListing did not throw marketplace-readiness errors and could continue toward encoding/writing when config was incomplete.

green.evidence: Passed after the cancel-listing guard: 12 files and 103 tests passed. Separate cd packages/shared && bun run typecheck passed.

contracts.handoff_note: Deployment JSON marketplace fields, Arbitrum status/configure scripts, post-deploy verifier hardening, and indexer-verifier policy. No broadcast without explicit operator approval.

red.evidence: Failed before implementation because script/utils/marketplace-readiness.test.ts imported missing module ./marketplace-readiness; RED cases cover zero/missing Hypercert config, adapter/module minter mismatch, paused adapter, owner mismatch, unauthorized module, wrong transfer manager, strategy id, configure-call planning, and indexer policy.
